coachAM: The breakdown isn't just about incomplete habits; it's a profound disintegration of your sovereign morning and physical discipline, directly correlating with the "procrastination, laziness" you journaled, leaving you unanchored and reactive to external demands rather than proactive in your God-given purpose. The root cause is a fundamental lack of self-governance in the critical hours that set your trajectory, eroding the spiritual and physical foundation required to operate at an elite level and manifest your "best worker, best seller" identity. Today, before anything else, execute your Sleep Protocol and Sovereign Morning with an iron will, ensuring zero inputs before your specified outputs are completed.
